Finally, there's padding bytes that we need to skip. So after all the required data is read, we need to check if there are remaining bytes and skip them. But how do we track how much data is left? The buffer is a span, so after each read, the offset increases. Wait, no. The buffer is a span, and when you read data from it, you have to manage the offset manually. Now, for the extract_packet_info function. This one is supposed to extract partial info without full deserialization. The packet_id is the first 4 bytes, so we can get a span of those bytes. Then, for the scores, we just read the count and skip over the data. So after reading the count, we advance the buffer pointer by count * sizeof(uint32_t) to skip the scores data.

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <ranges>
#include <span>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    NetworkPacket packet;
    hexi::stream_reader reader(buffer);

    // Read packet ID (4 bytes, little-endian)
    uint32_t packet_id = 0;
    reader.get(&packet_id, sizeof(packet_id));
    packet.packet_id = hexi::endian::le_to_native(packet_id);

    // Read username with 4-byte prefix
    {
        hexi::adaptors::prefixed<std::string> adaptor(4);
        reader >> adaptor;
        packet.username = adaptor->str;
    }

    // Read scores count and elements
    uint32_t scores_count = 0;
    reader.get(&scores_count, sizeof(scores_count));
    scores_count = hexi::endian::le_to_native(scores_count);
    packet.scores.resize_and_overwrite(scores_count, [&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
        reader.get(data, size);
        return size;
    });

    // Read metadata (null-terminated)
    auto offset = reader.offset();
    auto data = buffer.subspan(offset);
    auto pos = data.find_first_of(std::byte{0});
    packet.metadata = { reinterpret_cast<const char*>(data.data()), pos };
    reader.skip(pos + 1); // Skip metadata and null terminator

    // Skip any remaining padding
    if (buffer.size() > reader.offset()) {
        reader.skip(buffer.size() - reader.offset());
    }

    return packet;
}

struct PacketInfo {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string_view username;
};

PacketInfo extract_packet_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    PacketInfo info;
    hexi::stream_reader reader(buffer);

    // Get packet ID via span (first 4 bytes)
    const auto packet_id_span = buffer.first<4>();
    info.packet_id = 0;
    memcpy(&info.packet_id, packet_id_span.data(), 4);
    info.packet_id = hexi::endian::le_to_native(info.packet_id);

    // Read username with 4-byte prefix
    {
        hexi::adaptors::prefixed<std::string_view> adaptor(4);
        reader >> adaptor;
        info.username = adaptor->str;
    }

    // Read and skip scores count and data
    uint32_t scores_count = 0;
    reader.get(&scores_count, sizeof(scores_count));
    scores_count = hexi::endian::le_to_native(scores_count);
    reader.skip(scores_count * sizeof(uint32_t));

    return info;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct UserData {
    uint64_t user_id;
    uint8_t age;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream.put(&user_id, sizeof(user_id));
        stream.put(&age, sizeof(age));
        stream.put(name.data(), name.size());
    }
    
    void deserialise(auto& stream) {
        stream.get(&user_id, sizeof(user_id));
        stream.get(&age, sizeof(age));
        int name_len = 0;
        stream.get(&name_len, sizeof(name_len));
        name.resize_and_overwrite(name_len, [&](char* strbuf, std::size_t size) {
            stream.get(strbuf, size);
            return size;
        });
    }
};

UserData deserialize_user_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::exception_tag except_tag {};
    hexi::allocators/block_allocator allocator {};
    hexi::stream_reader reader(buffer, &except_tag, &allocator);
    
    UserData user;
    user.serialise(reader);  // Using the provided serialise method for deserialisation
    return user;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstddef>

const uint8_t* get_read_pointer(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    return buffer.data();
}

uint8_t* get_write_pointer(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    return buffer.data() + buffer.size();
}

struct BufferInfo {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo check_buffer_space(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    return {
        buffer.size(),
        buffer.capacity() - buffer.size()
    };
}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct DataResult {
    uint8_t data_type;
    std::vector<uint32_t> int_items;
    std::vector<float> float_items;
};

DataResult preview_and_read_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    DataResult result;
    result.data_type = buffer[0];

    if (buffer.size() < 1) {
        return result;
    }

    if (buffer.size() < 5) {
        return result;
    }

    hexi::buffer_adaptor<const uint8_t> count_adaptor(buffer.data() + 1, 4);
    uint32_t item_count = 0;
    hexi::binary_stream stream(count_adaptor);
    stream >> hexi::endian::le(item_count);

    const auto min_req_size = 1 + 4 + item_count * 4;
    if (buffer.size() < min_req_size) {
        return result;
    }

    if (result.data_type == 0) {
        result.int_items.resize(item_count);
        hexi::buffer_adaptor<const uint8_t> int_adaptor(buffer.data() + 5, item_count * 4);
        hexi::binary_stream int_stream(int_adaptor);
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {
            uint32_t value = 0;
            int_stream >> hexi::endian::le(value);
            result.int_items[i] = value;
        }
    } else if (result.data_type == 1) {
        result.float_items.resize(item_count);
        hexi::buffer_adaptor<const uint8_t> float_adaptor(buffer.data() + 5, item_count * 4);
        hexi::binary_stream float_stream(float_adaptor);
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {
            float value = 0.0f;
            float_stream >> hexi::endian::le(value);
            result.float_items[i] = value;
        }
    }

    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct PacketHeader {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
    uint16_t flags;
};

PacketHeader read_header_with_span(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    if (buffer.size() < sizeof(PacketHeader)) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::buffer_underrun(buffer.size(), sizeof(PacketHeader)));
    }

    PacketHeader header{};
    hexi::buffer_adaptor< const uint8_t > buffer_read(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer_read);
    stream >> header.magic >> header.version >> header.flags;
    return header;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct UserData {
    uint32_t user_id;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        adaptor(user_id, name);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_serialise_packet(uint32_t header, const UserData& data) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer;
    buffer.write(&header, sizeof(header));
    
    hexi::stream_write stream(buffer);
    data.serialise(stream);
    
    return std::vector<uint8_t>(buffer.read_data(), buffer.read_data() + buffer.size());
}
```</answer>

Case 3: buffer has 6 bytes: header (4), 'a', '\0'. Then data is [ 'a', '\0' ]. The loop runs i=0: data[0] is 'a' != '\0', i increments to 1. data[1] is '\0', so len becomes 1. So the message is "a".

Yes, that's correct.

So the code should work. Now, the code uses the binary_stream to read the header with endian conversion. The buffer_adaptor is used to wrap the span. Then, the message is handled by finding the null terminator.

So the final code should look like that.

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>

struct MessagePacket {
    uint32_t header;
    std::string_view message;
};

MessagePacket read_header_and_message(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    if (buffer.size() < 4) {
        return { 0, "" };
    }

    uint32_t header = 0;
    {
        hexi::buffer_adaptor< const std::span<uint8_t> > adaptor(buffer);
        hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
        stream.get(&header, sizeof(header), hexi::endian::le_to_native());
    }

    const auto data = buffer.data() + 4;
    size_t len = buffer.size() - 4;
    for (size_t i = 0; i < len; ++i) {
        if (data[i] == '\0') {
            len = i;
            break;
        }
    }

    return { header, std::string_view { reinterpret_cast<const char*>(data), len } };
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/dynamic_tls_buffer.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024, size_t allocator_count = 100>
hexi::dynamic_tls_buffer<block_size, allocator_count> create_tls_buffer() {

}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>
#include <cassert>

template<size_t element_count = 10>
void demonstrate_block_allocator_behavior() {
    hexi::block_allocator<int, element_count> allocator;
    std::vector<int*> allocated;

    // Allocate all elements to fill the initial block
    for (size_t i = 0; i < element_count; ++i) {
        allocated.push_back(allocator.allocate());
    }

    // Deallocate the last half, simulating push to free list head
    size_t deallocate_count = element_count / 2;
    for (size_t i = 0; i < deallocate_count; ++i) {
        allocator.deallocate(allocated[element_count - 1 - i]);
    }

    // Reallocate and verify LIFO order (popped from head)
    for (size_t i = 0; i < deallocate_count; ++i) {
        int* ptr = allocator.allocate();
        assert(ptr == allocated[element_count - 1 - i] && "Free list pop order incorrect!");
    }

    // Allocate beyond remaining free elements to trigger new block
    if (element_count > deallocate_count) {
        int* ptr = allocator.allocate();
        bool is_new_block = true;
        for (auto& addr : allocated) {
            if (ptr == addr) {
                is_new_block = false;
                break;
            }
        }
        assert(is_new_block && "New block not created!");
    }
}

#include <hexi/endian.h>

}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    const auto data = storage.data();
    std::vector<uint8_t> dest(bytes_to_preview);
    memcpy(dest.data(), data + storage.read_offset(), bytes_to_preview);
    return dest;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferStatus {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
BufferStatus<block_size> check_buffer_status(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    return { storage.size(), storage.free() };
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void reset_buffer(hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    storage.clear();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <filesystem>
#include <utility>
#include <cassert>
#include <cstddef>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace {

constexpr auto conditional_reverse(hexi::endian from, hexi::endian to, std::uint32_t value) -> std::uint32_t {
    if (from != to) {
        switch (from) {
            case hexi::endian::kBigEndian:
                return hexi::endian::be_to_native(value);
            case hexi::endian::kLittleEndian:
                return hexi::endian::le_to_native(value);
            default:
                break;
        }
    }
    return value;
}

} // unnamed

uint32_t read_uint32_from_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::buffer_read);
    std::uint32_t value = 0;

    if (buffer.size() < sizeof(value)) {
        return 0; // or handle error
    }

    buffer.get(&value, sizeof(value));
    return conditional_reverse(hexi::endian::kLittleEndian, hexi::endian::kNative, value);
}

void write_uint32_to_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, std::uint32_t value) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::buffer_write);
    const auto swapped = conditional_reverse(hexi::endian::kNative, hexi::endian::kLittleEndian, value);
    buffer.put(&swapped, sizeof(swapped));
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/concepts.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <concepts>
#include <filesystem>
#include <span>
#include <type_traits>
#include <utility>
#include <cassert>
#include <cstddef>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace detail;

template<typename T>
constexpr auto read(T* t, hexi::file_buffer& buffer) -> T {
    const auto bytes = sizeof(T);
    buffer.get(t, bytes);
    return *t;
}

template<typename T, typename U>
constexpr auto read(T* t, U* u, hexi::file_buffer& buffer) -> std::pair<T, U> {
    const auto bytes = sizeof(T) + sizeof(U);
    buffer.get(t, bytes);
    return {*t, *u};
}

template<typename T, typename U, typename V>
constexpr auto read(T* t, U* u, V* v, hexi::file_buffer& buffer) -> std::tuple<T, U, V> {
    const auto bytes = sizeof(T) + sizeof(U) + sizeof(V);
    buffer.get(t, bytes);
    return {*t, *u, *v};
}

template<typename ...Ts>
constexpr auto read(hexi::file_buffer& buffer, Ts*... ts) -> std::tuple<Ts...> {
    const auto total = (sizeof(Ts) + ... + 0);
    buffer.get(ts..., total);
    return {ts...};
}

template<decltype(auto) size>
constexpr auto read(void* destination, hexi::file_buffer& buffer) -> size {
    buffer.get(destination, size);
    return size;
}

template<typename container_type>
constexpr auto read(container_type& container, hexi::file_buffer& buffer) -> container_type& {
    using cvalue_type = typename container_type::value_type;
    if constexpr(memcpy_read<container_type, hexi::file_buffer>) {
            container.clear();
            const auto bytes = container.size() * sizeof(cvalue_type);
            buffer.get(container.data(), bytes);
            return container;
        } else {
            container.clear();
            while(buffer.can_read_seek()) [[while]] {
                cvalue_type t;
                *this >> t;
                container.emplace_back(std::move(t));
            }
            return container;
        }
}

template<typename container_type, typename count_type>
constexpr auto read(container_type& container, count_type count, hexi::file_buffer& buffer) -> container_type& {
    using cvalue_type = typename container_type::value_type;
    if constexpr(memcpy_read<container_type, hexi::file_buffer>) {
            const auto bytes = count * sizeof(cvalue_type);
            buffer.get(container.data(), bytes);
            container.resize_and_overwrite(count, [&](char*, std::size_t size) {
                return size == sizeof(cvalue_type) ? cvalue_type() : nullptr;
            });
            return container;
        } else {
            container.clear();
            for(count_type i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
                cvalue_type t;
                *this >> t;
                container.emplace_back(std::move(t));
            }
            return container;
        }
}

template<typename T, typename U, typename V, typename W>
constexpr auto read(T* t, U* u, V* v, W* w, hexi::file_buffer& buffer) -> std::tuple<T, U, V, W> {
    const auto bytes = sizeof(T) + sizeof(U) + sizeof(V) + sizeof(W);
    buffer.get(t, bytes);
    return {*t, *u, *v, *w};
}

template<typename T, typename U, typename V, typename W, typename X>
constexpr auto read(T* t, U* u, V* v, W* w, X* x, hexi::file_buffer& buffer) -> std::tuple<T, U, V, W, X> {
    const auto bytes = sizeof(T) + sizeof(U) + sizeof(V) + sizeof(W) + sizeof(X);
    buffer.get(t, bytes);
    return {*t, *u, *v, *w, *x};
}

template<typename T, typename U, typename V, typename W, typename X, typename Y>
constexpr auto read(T* t, U* u, V* v, W* w, X* x, Y* y, hexi::file_buffer& buffer) -> std::tuple<T, U, V, W, X, Y> {
    const auto bytes = sizeof(T) + sizeof(U) + sizeof(V) + sizeof(W) + sizeof(X) + sizeof(Y);
    buffer.get(t, bytes);
    return {*t, *u, *v, *w, *x, *y};
}

template<typename T, typename U, typename V, typename W, typename X, typename Y, typename Z>
constexpr auto read(T* t, U* u, V* v, W* w, X* x, Y* y, Z* z, hexi::file_buffer& buffer) -> std::tuple<T, U, V, W, X, Y, Z> {
    const auto bytes = sizeof(T) + sizeof(U) + sizeof(V) + sizeof(W) + sizeof(X) + sizeof(Y) + sizeof(Z);
    buffer.get(t, bytes);
    return {*t, *u, *v, *w, *x, *y, *z};
}

template<typename... Ts>
constexpr auto read(hexi::file_buffer& buffer, void* destination, const std::size_t total_size) {

}

template<typename ...Ts>
constexpr auto read(hexi::file_buffer& buffer, std::vector<Ts> auto& vec) -> std::vector<Ts>& {
    if constexpr(has_resize_overwrite<vec, Ts>) {
        vec.resize_and_overwrite(buffer.size(), [&](char*, std::size_t size) {
            return size == sizeof(Ts) ? new Ts : nullptr;
        });
    }
    buffer.get(vec.data(), vec.size() * sizeof(Ts));
    return vec;
}

template<typename ...Ts>
constexpr auto read(hexi::file_buffer& buffer, std::vector<Ts> auto& vec, std::size_t count) -> std::vector<Ts>& {
    if constexpr(has_resize_overwrite<vec, Ts>) {
        vec.resize_and_overwrite(count, [&](char*, std::size_t size) {
            return size == sizeof(Ts) ? new Ts : nullptr;
        });
    }
    buffer.get(vec.data(), count * sizeof(Ts));
    return vec;
}

template<typename ...Ts>
constexpr auto read(hexi::file_buffer& buffer, std::vector<Ts> auto& vec, std::size_t count, init_empty_t) -> std::vector<Ts>& {
    vec.clear();
    return *this >> count >> vec;
}

template<typename ...Ts>
constexpr auto read(hexi::file_buffer& buffer, std::vector<Ts> auto& vec, init_empty_t) -> std::vector<Ts>& {
    vec.clear();
    return *this >> vec;
}

    const auto total_size = adaptor.size() + (spans.size() * sizeof(Ts) + ... + 0);

constexpr auto read(void* destination, hexi::file_buffer& buffer) -> size {

template<typename container_type>
constexpr auto read(container_type& container, hexi::file_buffer& buffer) -> container_type& {
    using cvalue_type = typename container_type::value_type;
    if constexpr(memcpy_read<container_type, hexi::file_buffer>) {
            container.clear();
            const auto bytes = container.size() * sizeof(cvalue_type);
            buffer.get(container.data(), bytes);
            return container;
        } else {
            container.clear();
            while(buffer.can_read_seek()) [[while]] {
                cvalue_type t;
                *this >> t;
                container.emplace_back(std::move(t));
            }
            return container;
        }
}

template<typename container_type, typename count_type>
constexpr auto read(container_type& container, count_type count, hexi::file_buffer& buffer) -> container_type& {
    using cvalue_type = typename container_type::value_type;
    if constexpr(memcpy_read<container_type, hexi::file_buffer>) {
            const auto bytes = count * sizeof(cvalue_type);
            buffer.get(container.data(), bytes);
            container.resize_and_overwrite(count, [&](char*, std::size_t size) {
                return size == sizeof(cvalue_type) ? cvalue_type() : nullptr;
            });
            return container;
        } else {
            container.clear();
            for(count_type i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
                cvalue_type t;
                *this >> t;
                container.emplace_back(std::move(t));
            }
            return container;
        }
}

    const auto bytes = sizeof(T) + sizeof(U) + sizeof(V) + sizeof(W) + sizeof(X) + sizeof(Y) + sizeof(Z);
    buffer.get(t, bytes);
    return {*t, *u, *v, *w, *x, *y, *z};
}

template<typename... Ts>
constexpr auto read(hexi::file_buffer& buffer, void* destination, const std::size_t total_size) {
    assert(total_size == sizeof(Ts)...);
    buffer.get(destination, total_size);
}

template<typename... Ts>
constexpr auto read(hexi::file_buffer& buffer, span<Ts>... destinations) {

}

template<typename ...Ts>
constexpr auto read(hexi::file_buffer& buffer, std::vector<Ts> auto& vec) -> std::vector<Ts>& {
    if constexpr(has_resize_overwrite<vec, Ts>) {
        vec.resize_and_overwrite(buffer.size(), [&](char*, std::size_t size) {
            return size == sizeof(Ts) ? new Ts : nullptr;
        });
    }
    buffer.get(vec.data(), vec.size() * sizeof(Ts));
    return vec;
}

template<typename ...Ts>
constexpr auto read(hexi::file_buffer& buffer, std::vector<Ts> auto& vec, std::size_t count) -> std::vector<Ts>& {
    if constexpr(has_resize_overwrite<vec, Ts>) {
        vec.resize_and_overwrite(count, [&](char*, std::size_t size) {
            return size == sizeof(Ts) ? new Ts : nullptr;
        });
    }
    buffer.get(vec.data(), count * sizeof(Ts));
    return vec;
}

template<typename ...Ts>
constexpr auto read(hexi::file_buffer& buffer, std::vector<Ts> auto& vec, std::size_t count, init_empty_t) -> std::vector<Ts>& {
    vec.clear();
    return *this >> count >> vec;
}

template<typename ...Ts>
constexpr auto read(hexi::file_buffer& buffer, std::vector<Ts> auto& vec, init_empty_t) -> std::vector<Ts>& {
    vec.clear();
    return *this >> vec;
}

template<typename T, typename U>
constexpr auto read(hexi::file_buffer& buffer, std::string_view& str, T& t, U& u) -> std::string_view& {
    let adaptor = hexi::dynamic_buffer_adaptor(str);
    const auto bytes = adaptor.size() + sizeof(T) + sizeof(U);
    buffer.get(adaptor.data(), bytes);
    memcpy(&t, adaptor.data() + adaptor.size(), sizeof(T));
    memcpy(&u, adaptor.data() + adaptor.size() + sizeof(T), sizeof(U));
    return str;
}

template<typename ...Ts>
constexpr auto read(hexi::file_buffer& buffer, std::string_view& str, Ts*... args) -> std::string_view& {
    let adaptor = hexi::dynamic_buffer_adaptor(str);
    const auto total_size = adaptor.size() + sizeof(Ts) + ... + 0;
    buffer.get(adaptor.data(), total_size);
    (memcpy(args, adaptor.data() + adaptor.size() + sizeof(Ts)*i, sizeof(Ts)), ... , i++);
    return str;
}

#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <string>

void write_string_to_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const std::string& str) {
    const auto size = str.size();
    writer.write(&size, sizeof(size));
    writer.write(str.data(), size);
}

std::string read_string_from_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    int size = 0;
    char size_buf[4];
    reader.read(size_buf, 4);
    memcpy(&size, size_buf, 4);
    if (size <= 0) {
        return "";
    }
    std::string str;
    str.resize_and_overwrite(size, [&](char* buffer, std::size_t len) {
        reader.get(buffer, len);
        return len;
    });
    return str;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void peek_data_from_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, void* data, std::size_t length) {
    buffer.copy(data, length);
}

template<typename T>
void peek_value_from_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, T& value) {
    buffer.copy(value);
}

bool peek_and_compare(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, const void* expected, std::size_t length) {
    if (length == 0) return true; // nothing to compare

    char temp[length];
    buffer.copy(temp, length);
    const char* expected_data = static_cast<const char*>(expected);
    
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < length; ++i) {
        if (temp[i] != expected_data[i]) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void skip_bytes_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::size_t bytes) {
    buffer.skip(bytes);
}

struct MessageHeader {
    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {

    buffer.get(&header, sizeof(header));
    
    if(buffer.size() < header.body_length) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer underrun: {} byte body requested, buffer contains {} bytes",
                                  header.body_length, buffer.size()));
    }
    
    buffer.skip(header.body_length);
    return header;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

const void* get_read_pointer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    return buffer.read_ptr();
}

struct BufferState {
    std::size_t size;
    const void* read_ptr;
    bool is_empty;
};

BufferState get_buffer_state(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    BufferState state;
    state.size = buffer.size();
    state.read_ptr = buffer.read_ptr();
    state.is_empty = buffer.empty();
    return state;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void clear_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    buffer.clear();
}

void conditional_clear_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    if (buffer.empty()) {
        buffer.clear();
    }
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

void write_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream, const std::string& str) {
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(str);
}

    std::string str;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(str);
    return str;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstddef>

using namespace hexi::detail;

bool check_regions_overlap(const void* src, std::size_t src_len, const void* dst, std::size_t dst_len) {
    const auto src_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(src);
    const auto src_end = src_beg + src_len;
    const auto dst_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(dst);
    const auto dst_end = dst_beg + dst_len;
    return src_beg < dst_end && dst_beg < src_end;
}

bool safe_memory_copy(void* destination, const void* source, std::size_t length) {
    if (check_regions_overlap(source, length, destination, length)) {
        std::memmove(destination, source, length);
    } else {
        std::memcpy(destination, source, length);
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <array>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<std::size_t Size>
constexpr auto create_filled_array(std::uint8_t value) {
    std::array<std::uint8_t, Size> target{};
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < Size; ++i) {
        target[i] = value;
    }
    return target;
}

template<std::size_t Size>
constexpr bool verify_filled_array(const std::array<std::uint8_t, Size>& arr, std::uint8_t expected_value) {
    for (const auto& elem : arr) {
        if (elem != expected_value) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

    std::size_t limit_or_size;
    std::string message;
};

ExceptionDetails extract_underrun_info(const hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
    return {
        e.read_size(),
        e.total_read(),
        e.buff_size(),
        e.what()
    };
}

ExceptionDetails extract_read_limit_info(const hexi::stream_read_limit& e) {
    return {
        e.read_size(),
        e.total_read(),
        e.read_limit(),
        e.what()
    };
}

std::string get_exception_message(const hexi::exception& e) {
    return e.what();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <span>
#include <vector>
#include <string>

struct CompactPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::vector<std::string> tags;
    std::string data;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::stream_write_adaptor write_adaptor(buffer);
    
    // Write fixed-length packet ID
    write_adaptor.put(&packet.packet_id, sizeof(packet.packet_id));
    
    // Serialize tags with prefixed_varint encoding
    hexi::prefixed_varint_encode<2>(write_adaptor, packet.tags.size());
    for (const auto& tag : packet.tags) {
        hexi::prefixed_varint_encode<2>(write_adaptor, tag.size());
        write_adaptor.put(tag.data(), tag.size());
    }
    
    // Serialize data with prefixed_varint encoding
    hexi::prefixed_varint_encode<2>(write_adaptor, packet.data.size());
    write_adaptor.put(packet.data.data(), packet.data.size());
    
    return buffer;
}

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    CompactPacket packet;
    hexi::stream_read_adaptor read_adaptor(buffer);
    
    // Read fixed-length packet ID
    read_adaptor.get(&packet.packet_id, sizeof(packet.packet_id));
    
    // Read tags count
    int tags_count = 0;
    hexi::prefixed_varint_decode<2>(read_adaptor, &tags_count);
    packet.tags.resize_and_overwrite(tags_count, [&](char* tag, std::size_t size) {
        // Read each tag's size and data
        std::size_t read_size = 0;
        hexi::prefixed_varint_decode<2>(read_adaptor, &read_size);
        if (read_size > size) read_size = size;
        read_adaptor.get(tag, read_size);
        return read_size;
    });
    
    // Read data
    std::size_t data_size = 0;
    hexi::prefixed_varint_decode<2>(read_adaptor, &data_size);

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer;

    // Write header (2 bytes)
    buffer.write(&packet.header, sizeof(packet.header));

    // Write data with 4-byte prefix
    const auto data_len = static_cast<std::uint32_t>(packet.data.size());
    buffer.write(&data_len, sizeof(data_len));
    buffer.write(packet.data.data(), packet.data.size());

    // Write 16-byte padding filled with 0x00
    const auto padding = hexi::fill<16>(0x00);
    buffer.write(padding.data(), padding.size());

    // Write footer (4 bytes)
    buffer.write(&packet.footer, sizeof(packet.footer));

    return buffer.to_vector();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_base.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstddef>

class CustomBuffer : public hexi::pmc::buffer_base {
    std::vector<std::byte> data_;
    
public:
    // Override the virtual methods from buffer_base
    std::size_t size() const override { return data_.size(); }
    [[nodiscard]]
    bool empty() const override { return data_.empty(); }

    // Helper method to add data (for testing)
    void add_data(const void* source, std::size_t length) {
        const std::byte* bytes = static_cast<const std::byte*>(source);
        data_.insert(data_.end(), bytes, bytes + length);
    }
    
    // Helper method to clear data (for testing)
    void clear() {
        data_.clear();
    }
};
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_read_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& input_data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer(1024); // Sufficiently large buffer
    hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor write_adaptor(buffer);
    
    // Write data to the buffer
    write_adaptor.write(input_data.data(), input_data.size());
    
    // Prepare to read back
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor read_adaptor(buffer);
    std::vector<uint8_t> output(input_data.size());
    read_adaptor.read(output.data(), output.size());
    
    return output;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_data_without_advancing(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer_data, std::size_t peek_size) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor read_adaptor(buffer_data);
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(peek_size);
    
    // Copy data without advancing the read cursor
    read_adaptor.copy(result.data(), peek_size);
    
    // Consume the data to advance the read cursor
    std::vector<uint8_t> dummy(peek_size);
    read_adaptor.read(dummy.data(), dummy.size());
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct Header {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
};

Header peek_header_without_reading(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    Header header{};
    adaptor.copy(&header, sizeof(header));
    return header;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_then_conditionally_read(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    uint8_t first_byte = 0;
    adaptor.copy(&first_byte, 1);
    
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    if (first_byte == 0x01) { // Example condition, replace with actual logic
        result.resize_and_overwrite(5, [](char* target, std::size_t size) {
            return size;
        });
        adaptor.read(result.data(), 5);
    }
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <ranges>
#include <vector>
#include <span>

struct ProtocolPacket {
    uint32_t message_id;
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    uint32_t checksum;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    hexi::buffer_sequence buffer;
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);

    // Serialize message_id (native to big-endian)
    const auto swapped_id = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id);
    stream.put(&swapped_id, sizeof(swapped_id));

    // Serialize data_values (each element native to big-endian)
    std::vector<uint16_t> swapped_data;
    swapped_data.reserve(packet.data_values.size());
    for (const auto& val : packet.data_values) {
        swapped_data.push_back(hexi::endian::native_to_big(val));
    }
    stream.put_container(swapped_data);

    // Serialize checksum (native to big-endian)
    const auto swapped_checksum = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
    stream.put(&swapped_checksum, sizeof(swapped_checksum));

    return buffer.str();
}

ProtocolPacket deserialize_protocol_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::binary_stream_reader stream(buffer);
    ProtocolPacket packet;

    // Deserialize message_id (big-endian to native)
    uint32_t swapped_id = 0;
    stream.get(&swapped_id, sizeof(swapped_id));
    packet.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(swapped_id);

    // Deserialize data_values count (big-endian to native)
    uint32_t count = 0;
    stream.get(&count, sizeof(count));
    count = hexi::endian::big_to_native(count);

    // Deserialize data_values (each element big-endian to native)
    packet.data_values.resize_and_overwrite(count, [&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
        for (int i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
            uint16_t swapped_val = 0;
            stream.get(&swapped_val, sizeof(swapped_val));
            ((uint16_t*)data)[i] = hexi::endian::big_to_native(swapped_val);
        }
        return size;
    });

    // Deserialize checksum (big-endian to native)
    uint32_t swapped_checksum = 0;
    stream.get(&swapped_checksum, sizeof(swapped_checksum));
    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(swapped_checksum);

    return packet;
}

struct ProtocolHeader {
    uint32_t message_id;
};

ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::binary_stream_reader reader(buffer);
    uint32_t swapped_id = 0;
    reader.get(&swapped_id, sizeof(swapped_id));
    const auto message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(swapped_id);
    reader.skip(sizeof(swapped_id));
    return { message_id };
}
```</answer>

void serialise(auto& stream) const {
    stream.put(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
    for (const auto& temp : temperatures) {
        float swapped = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse<false>(temp, hexi::endian::native, hexi::endian::little);
        stream.put(&swapped, sizeof(swapped));
    }
    double swapped_pressure = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse<false>(pressure, hexi::endian::native, hexi::endian::little);
    stream.put(&swapped_pressure, sizeof(swapped_pressure));
}

void serialise(auto& stream) {
    // Deserialise
    stream.get(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
    temperatures.clear();
    for (int i = 0; i < num_temperatures; ++i) {
        float temp = 0;
        stream.get(&temp, sizeof(temp));
        hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(temp);
        temperatures.push_back(temp);
    }
    double pressure = 0;
    stream.get(&pressure, sizeof(pressure));
    hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(pressure);
    this->pressure = pressure;
}
